categories.def: a container in which plants are cultivated

categories.def: a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

categories.def: electronic device for communicating by voice over long distances (includes wired and wireless/cell phones)

categories.def: a garment worn around the head or neck or shoulders for warmth or decoration

categories.def: a written work or composition that has been published
